mapper.insert: insert into mag_agent_message (message_id, session_id, agent_code, user_id, role, content, event_type, structured_json, reference_json, attachment_json, ragflow_message_id, create_time) values (#{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{agentCode}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{eventType}, #{structuredJson}, #{referenceJson}, #{attachmentJson}, #{ragflowMessageId}, #{createTime})
